Picking_Up_The_Pieces.title: Picking Up The Pieces

objectives.text: Visit any area on your map with a loot category icon
Loot 3 containers

Picking_Up_The_Pieces.dialogue: The storm has mostly settled, but much of our infrastructure has taken a proper beating. If you're hoping to stay with us, I'll need you to pull your weight in the repair efforts.

Trash_Into_Treasure.title: Trash Into Treasure

objectives.text: Obtain 6 Wires
Obtain 1 Battery

Trash_Into_Treasure.dialogue: There's no such thing as junk, to a Raider; just valuable materials waiting to be recycled. If you're going to amount to anything around here, you can't just wait for things to be served on a silver platter.

Clearer_Skies.title: Clearer Skies

objectives.text: Destroy 3 ARC enemies
Get 3 ARC Alloy for Shani

Clearer_Skies.dialogue: A swarm of disoriented Wasps crashed near one of our skylights. I need you to help thin ARC's ranks before any more accidents happen, and gather some extra sturdy materials to fix the damage.

Off_The_Radar.title: Off The Radar

objectives.text: Visit a Field Depot
Repair the antenna on the roof of the Field Depot

Off_The_Radar.dialogue: The damage down here was pretty bad, but our Topside infrastructure was hit even harder. I still have several antennas that stopped working after the storm.

A_Bad_Feeling.title: A Bad Feeling

objectives.text: Find and search any ARC Probe or ARC Courier

A_Bad_Feeling.dialogue: Even the slightest change to ARC's behavior could spell disaster. And that signal you heard? It's like nothing we've ever picked up. If they're up to something, we need to find out whatever we can.

Hatch_Repairs.title: Hatch Repairs

objectives.text: Repair the leaking hydraulic pipes near a Raider Hatch
Search for a Hatch Key near the Raider Hatch

Hatch_Repairs.dialogue: Our scouts have reported several Raider Hatches with leaking hydraulic pipes. They still work, but not for long. Mind patching one up, next time you're out there?

The_Right_Tool.title: The Right Tool

objectives.text: Destroy a Fireball
Destroy a Hornet
Destroy a Turret

The_Right_Tool.dialogue: You're one of the new arrivals, right? I need a volunteer to test out this upgraded Ferro; should cut through ARC plating like butter. Go put holes in some machines, and report back to me.

Down_To_Earth.title: Down To Earth

objectives.text: Visit a Field Depot
Deliver a Field Crate to Supply Station
Collect the reward

Down_To_Earth.dialogue: Raiders have long reported peculiar-looking crates dropping down from malfunctioning ARC Probes . If we can figure out a way to crack them open, we might get a better understanding of what it is they're after.

A_Better_Use.title: A Better Use

objectives.text: Request in a Supply Drop from a Call Station
Loot a Supply Drop

A_Better_Use.dialogue: We're short on everything but mouths to feed, yet Celeste's launching precious supplies into the air for Raiders to claw over. I'm done letting the good stuff go to waste.

The_Trifecta.title: The Trifecta

objectives.text: Destroy a Wasp
Get a Wasp Driver for Shani
Destroy a Hornet
Get a Hornet Driver for Shani
Destroy a Snitch
Get a Snitch Scanner for Shani

The_Trifecta.dialogue: Intel's all well and good, but only gets us so far. If ARC's truly closing in, I need every Raider to prove they can handle their drones in a fight.

Greasing_Her_Palms.title: Greasing Her Palms

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds visit the Locked Room in the Water Treatment Control building
On Spaceport, scope out the rocket thrusters outside the Rocket Assembly
On Buried City, visit the barricaded area on floor 6 of the Space Travel Building

Greasing_Her_Palms.dialogue: Recently, I've been trying and failing to get Tian Wen to join our community projects. So [ 1 ] , I may have to sweeten the deal. She's been complaining about the quality of salvage found on the market; think we could do her a solid?

Dormant_Barons.title: Dormant Barons

objectives.text: Loot a Baron Husk

Dormant_Barons.dialogue: During the First Wave the Barons did more damage than all the other machines combined. Now they're mere husks; fixed in place where they once fell... Still, their internals might hold the answer to keeping ARC at bay. So open one up, and bring me whatever is inside.

What_We_Left_Behind.title: What We Left Behind

objectives.text: On Buried City, search 2 containers in the Raider Camp beneath the Parking Garage. To reach the raiders camp, take the elevator zipline to the lower level buried in the sand.
On Dam Battlegrounds, search for anything significant in the South Swamp Outpost.
On Spaceport, search for anything significant in Bilguun's Hideout, next to the Container Storage. Is a tall structure next to the wall on the east side.

What_We_Left_Behind.dialogue: Celeste told me you're the one who helped her hound me about pitching in more. I'll say this once: I don't appreciate the meddling, and I have my own reasons for refusing. I do however, appreciate the scrap. Since you're apparently good at tracking it down, I may have a task for you.

Doctor's_Orders.title: Doctor's Orders

objectives.text: Obtain 1 Syringe
Obtain 2 Antiseptic
Obtain 1 Durable Cloth
Obtain 1 Great Mullein

Doctor's_Orders.dialogue: Say, newbie: if you want me to treat you, you better prove that those precious limbs of yours are worth bandaging.

Broken_Monument.title: Broken Monument

objectives.text: Reach the hallowed grounds by the Scrap Yard
Search for a compass near the broken-down vehicles
Search for the video tape near the cylindrical containers
Search for the old field rations in the Raider camp
Deliver the First Wave Tape to Tian Wen
Deliver First Wave Compass to Tian Wen
Deliver First Wave Rations to Tian Wen

Broken_Monument.dialogue: I have another special site I need you to search for me. An old battlegrounds, from the First Wave. Raiders nowadays usually pick places like that clean, despite the significance they once held. People forget quickly. Quicker than they should.

Medical_Merchandise.title: Medical Merchandise

objectives.text: On Spaceport, search 2 containers in the Departure Building's exam rooms
Search 3 containers in the Hospital on Buried City
On Dam Battlegrounds, search 2 containers in the Research & Administration building's medical room

Medical_Merchandise.dialogue: I've become quite craft at weaving bandages from Fabric, but to my shame, I haven't quite mastered weaving an x-ray machine or a pulse oximiter.

Marked_For_Death.title: Marked For Death

objectives.text: Reach the Su Durante Warehouses in the Outskirts in Buried City
Search for Tian Wen's cache near the Warehouses
Follow the clues

Marked_For_Death.dialogue: Someone has been lifting supplies from my drop-off point in Buried City. I've set up a trap, but I need someone to check it for me.

Straight_Record.title: Straight Record

objectives.text: Reach Victory Ridge
Find the old EMP trap
Disable the first power switch
Disable the second power switch
Disable the third power switch
Shut down the EMP trap

Straight_Record.dialogue: Back during the First Wave, my squad and I built a trap out by the Dam. We [ 1 ] overloaded a generator, turned it into a makeshift ARC trap. Now I hear Raiders are using it to cut comms and spring ambushes on each other. I need you to end it.

A_Reveal_In_Ruins.title: A Reveal In Ruins

objectives.text: Search for an ESR Analyzer inside any pharmacy in Buried City
Deliver the ESR Analyzer to Lance

A_Reveal_In_Ruins.dialogue: I got my hands on a fancy new ESR Analyzer; had a whole big reveal planned. One minute it's here, next minute—poof. Please help?

Market_Correction.title: Market Correction

objectives.text: Locate the cache near Marano Station
Sabotage the cache

Market_Correction.dialogue: That theft before? Doesn't look like a coincidence anymore. Some of the competition from Toledo is setting up shop where they don't belong. I want their cache sabotaged, preferably before they get too comfortable.

Keeping_The_Memory.title: Keeping The Memory

objectives.text: Reach the wreckage in the Formicai Hills
Search for the missing helmet
Return the helmet to the memorial

Keeping_The_Memory.dialogue: Look, I lost my cool a bit when I sent you after that trap. I don't usually lose my temper, but the First Wave... We went through a lot, back then. Lost a lot of people. It's still a bit of a raw wound for me, but I want you to understand.

A_Lay_Of_The_Land.title: A Lay Of The Land

objectives.text: Reach the Jiangsu Warehouse
Find the shipping notes in the foreman's office
Locate the scanners on the upper floor of Control Tower A6
Deliver 1 LiDAR Scanner to Shani

A_Lay_Of_The_Land.dialogue: Those distant rumbles are getting less distant with each passing day. I have a lead on some LiDAR scanners that may help us monitor the tremors. You do want to keep a roof over your head, don't you?

Eyes_On_The_Prize.title: Eyes On The Prize

objectives.text: Find the secluded roof terrace south-west of the Southern Station, look for blue tarps
Rewire the solar panel using 3 Wires

Eyes_On_The_Prize.dialogue: Everything's been calm around my drop-offs since you helped out, but that doesn't mean it'll stay that way for long. I've set up surveillance at one of my most used spots in Buried City, to prevent future tampering. Only problem is, it needs power to go live.

Echoes_Of_Victory_Ridge.title: Echoes Of Victory Ridge

objectives.text: Reach Victory Ridge
Retrieve the battle plans from the hideout under the broken highway
Deliver Major Aiva's Patch to Celeste

Echoes_Of_Victory_Ridge.dialogue: Did you feel any tremors last night? Me neither. But apparently the ground shifted at some point, and in the process it unearthed an old First Wave outpost that'd been blocked by debris. I'd like you to get in there quick, before anyone else does.

Eyes_in_the_Sky.title: Eyes in the Sky

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds, install a LiDAR Scanner at the top of the Control Tower
On Spaceport, install a LiDAR Scanner at the Communications Tower
On Buried City, install a LiDAR Scanner on top of the Galleria sign

Eyes_in_the_Sky.dialogue: Those LiDAR scanners you found work best when put in high locations. I've identified a few good spots around the Rust Belt; hope you're surefooted.

Industrial_Espionage.title: Industrial Espionage

objectives.text: Find Tian Wen's weapon cache near the Gas Station in the Outskirts
Deliver the Burletta to the rival weapon cache
Plant a bug on the weapon cache

Industrial_Espionage.dialogue: With my own stashes secured, I think it might be time to keep a closer eye on the competition so this doesn't happen again.

A_Balanced_Harvest.title: A Balanced Harvest

objectives.text: Go to the Research & Administration building
Locate Lab 1 on the upper floor above the reception
Search for any traces of the agricultural research project

A_Balanced_Harvest.dialogue: Our food production is finally enough to meet our basic needs, but what we really need now is variety. I have a lead on some agricultural research from before the First Wave. Are you in?

Unexpected_Initiative.title: Unexpected Initiative

objectives.text: Reach the Grandioso Apartments in Buried City
Search for a Moisture Meter on the rooftop of the Grandioso Apartments
Reach Piazza Roma in Buried City
Search for a Nutrient Meter in the broken rooftop gardens at Piazza Roma
Deliver a Nutrient Meter to Tian Wen
Deliver a Moisture Meter to Tian Wen

Unexpected_Initiative.dialogue: I'm setting up a greenhouse, to help boost our food production. I'm doing Celeste a solid, alright? That's all. But enough about that. I've got all the details worked out, but I'll need supplies, and I'm not hauling them alone.

Untended_Garden.title: Untended Garden

objectives.text: Go to the Hydroponic Dome Complex
Access the data archive in one of the domes
Upload the data to the computer terminal in any Field Depot

Untended_Garden.dialogue: According to the files you found in the lab, the cultivation researchers were actually the ones who set up the hydroponic domes out in the swamp. Sounds like the most obvious place to search next, don't you think?

A_Symbol_of_Unification.title: A Symbol of Unification

objectives.text: Reach the Formicai Outpost in Dam Battlegrounds
Locate the flag at the Formicai Outpost
Hoist the flag on the small platform overlooking the Red Lake

A_Symbol_of_Unification.dialogue: Y'Know, back in the day we actually used to have a flag - well , a scrap of cloth more than anything. Still, seeing it meant you knew you had allies nearby, that you were on your own home turf. So, I was thinking...

After_Rain_Comes.title: After Rain Comes

objectives.text: Find the flooded solar panels nearby the Grandioso Apartments
Repair the solar panels using 5 Wires and 2 Battery

After_Rain_Comes.dialogue: I know, I know! The power's down in sector— Hey [ 1 ] . A flash flood took out some of our solar panels in Buried City, and the generators only hold on for so long. Do us all a solid when you're up there, OK?

The_Root_Of_The_Matter.title: The Root Of The Matter

objectives.text: Go to the Research Building
Search the seed vault in the "room with a great view"
Deliver the Experimental Seed Sample to Celeste

The_Root_Of_The_Matter.dialogue: We're in luck. The notes you found last time [ 1 ] were written by the lead researcher. When the project went under, it seems she took some of the seed samples and sealed them away in a secure location.

The_Major's_Footlocker.title: The Major's Footlocker

objectives.text: Search for Major Aiva's mementos in the apartments northwest of The Dam
Deliver Major Aiva's Mementos to Tian Wen

The_Major's_Footlocker.dialogue: I have another job. It's.. about my mom [ 1 ] . Those First Wave sites I sent you to before? I actually hoped you'd find something of my mother's. She fought in the Raider resistance. It was a long shot; but now I've got an actual lead.

Celeste's_Journals.title: Celeste's Journals

objectives.text: Retrieve Celeste's Journals from the South Swamp Outpost
Retrieve Celeste's Journals from the northern outpost overlooking the Red Lakes
Deliver 2 Journals to Celeste

Celeste's_Journals.dialogue: Okay, so this is awkward... I lost two of my journals during some outpost inspections last time I went topside. Could you head out there and try to find them back before someone else stumbles on them?

Water_Troubles.title: Water Troubles

objectives.text: Locate the Flood Access Tunnel under the Red Lake Balcony
Find the intake to the District's Water Supply
Sample the water

Water_Troubles.dialogue: If you're here to complain about the water, join the club. I've been fielding complaints all day. Something is definitely up with it, and I need some help to sort it out.

Back_on_Top.title: Back on Top

objectives.text: On Dam Battlegrounds, mark the Pattern House
On The Blue Gate, mark the white lookout tower south of the Warehouse Complex
On Spaceport, mark the South Trench Tower
On Buried City, mark the building with the mural in the Buried Properties

Back_on_Top.dialogue: Guess what? Shani asked me to help out with something, and for once, I'm actually glad she did. We're setting up new outposts topside! Or, planning to, at least. Can you believe it?

Source_Of_The_Contamination.title: Source Of The Contamination

objectives.text: Reach the Water Treatment Building in The Dam
Search for the Flood Spill Intake near the Swamp
Investigate any suspicious objects

Source_Of_The_Contamination.dialogue: I'm not saying our water's been tampered with, but based on your samples, I can't rule out the possibility either. Would you return to the Dam and see what's wrong?

Our_Presence_up_There.title: Our Presence up There

objectives.text: Visit the Pattern House in The Dam
Find and flip the power switch
Complete the antenna installation on the roof

Our_Presence_up_There.dialogue: ARC may be changing, but we're finally changing with it. Let's finish up those outposts so we track them, flank them; smash them to bits. [ 1 ]

Switching_The_Supply.title: Switching The Supply

objectives.text: Find the tunnels under the Spaceport
Find and turn the valve in the tunnels under Spaceport

Switching_The_Supply.dialogue: There is a reservoir beneath the Spaceport; if we manage to route that water here, that should buy us time to deal with the contamination.

Lost_In_Transmission.title: Lost In Transmission

objectives.text: Visit Control Tower A6
Reach the top of Control Tower A6
Establish a connection from the terminal

Lost_In_Transmission.dialogue: I have equipment set up at the Spaceport, to monitor ARC's movements. My connection broke down just now, I need you to head to the Control Towers and help me retrieve my logs.

A_Warm_Place_To_Rest.title: A Warm Place To Rest

objectives.text: Locate the Abandoned Highway Camp
Search for any signs of survivors
Follow the red markers
Inspect the grave

A_Warm_Place_To_Rest.dialogue: A customer of mine saw a family taking cover in an old encampment in Buried City. I'll pay anyone who manages to find them and escort them back to safety.

Communication_Hideout.title: Communication Hideout

objectives.text: Reach the Red Tower in Old Town
Find missing battery cell
Install battery cell in the Generator
Enable the power on the Generator
Boot the antenna terminal near the Red Tower

Communication_Hideout.dialogue: We've been losing signals in some areas of Buried City - my guess is that our equipment is acting up. You're quite skilled with repairs, aren't you? Could you check it out?

Prescriptions_Of_The_Past.title: Prescriptions Of The Past

objectives.text: Visit the Departure Building in Spaceport
Find the Medical Exam Room inside the Departure Building
Search for the records

Prescriptions_Of_The_Past.dialogue: I've been curious about the medical area in the Spaceport for a while now. Wanna do me a solid and see what records you can dig up from that place? [ 1 ]

Into_The_Fray.title: Into The Fray

objectives.text: Destroy a Leaper
Obtain a Leaper Pulse Unit

Into_The_Fray.dialogue: It used to be their world, up there. Nobody to challenge their claim. Yet here we are. More outposts. More intel. More firepower. If I didn't know better, I'd say we've got quite a bit of a fight left in us.

Power_Out.title: Power Out

objectives.text: Find the Electrical Substation south of the Spaceport
Find any sign of the missing engineer
Install the fuse
Restore the power

Power_Out.dialogue: This goes beyond bad luck. Something—or someone—has knocked out some of our electrical substations. The engineer I sent out to fix it hasn't returned, so I need all available Raiders to look into it. That includes you.

Paving_The_Way.title: Paving The Way

objectives.text: Go to any ENELICA building
Search for a notice board with a note from the researcher
On Buried City, reach the top floor above the Convinio in Piazza Roma
Find the researcher's flat and search for any research data

Paving_The_Way.dialogue: For an entire sector to collapse like that... No wonder people are scared. We need to reinforce beyond anything we've done before, and we can't do it alone.

Flickering_Threat.title: Flickering Threat

objectives.text: Find the Generator Room
Repair the Generator
Find the Ventilation Shaft
Enable the power via the power switch underneath the stairs

Flickering_Threat.dialogue: My usual engineer is still healing from his wounds, and has been loopy for days. We can't afford to be at half-grid until he heals; I need someone to pick up his wrench in the mean time.

Deciphering_The_Data.title: Deciphering The Data

objectives.text: Use the Magnetic Decryptor in the Fuel Control Building
Reach the Arrival Building in Spaceport
Use the Magnetic Decryptor on the top floor of the Arrival Building

Deciphering_The_Data.dialogue: If the data you found can keep the ceiling from collapsing, we have no time to spare. I know of a few magnetic decryptors around Acerra Spaceport, from back during the Exodus. They might still be working.

Bees!.title: Bees!

objectives.text: Reach the Olive Grove in Blue Gate
Search the bee hives around the Olive Grove

Bees!.dialogue: Bees! There are bees still around! While I'm no expert, our greenhouse crew desperately wants some.

Groundbreaking.title: Groundbreaking

objectives.text: Find a spare Blue Gate Communication Tower Key[1]
Enter the locked room at Pilgrim's Peak
Search the room for any construction research
Find the building pictured on the whiteboard
Photograph the abandoned housing project

Groundbreaking.dialogue: Data or no data: we'll learn how to make this place earthquake-proof. With a research this in-depth, there's bound to be a paper trail somewhere.

Dust_On_The_Wires.title: Dust On The Wires

objectives.text: Vist any Field Depot on the eastern side of the Spaceport
Use the Field Radio to transmit the scout group's last log to Shani
Interact with the terminal in the old Raider Tower north of the Maintenance Hanger
Find traces of the scout patrol near the Maintenance Hanger
Search the remains left by the scouts
Deliver the Scout Patrol Note to Shani

Dust_On_The_Wires.dialogue: I sent a scout team to the Spaceport a while ago. Routine work — cataloging security, see if there's anything we could re-purpose. But I've heard nothing for two days.

Espresso.title: Espresso

objectives.text: Find an Espresso Machine to salvage for spare parts
Get the Espresso Machine Parts for Apollo

Espresso.dialogue: A Raider came into my shop earlier, to trade some grenades for a machine she found in Buried City. She said it makes coffee, but it seems to be missing a few parts. Up for a job?

A_Dead_End.title: A Dead End

objectives.text: Find MANTIKOR's underground facilities
Search the locked room for any records on Project Heartwood
Find the Dusty Film Reel
Deliver the Dusty Film Reel to Shani

A_Dead_End.dialogue: I... I don't get it. One day they were trying to stave off the Collapse, and then, suddenly... Nothing. That earthquake-resistant housing project was shut down by a group called MANTIKOR. Think you could find out more?

Life_Of_A_Pharmacist.title: Life Of A Pharmacist

objectives.text: Find the Arbusto Farmacia by the collapsed highway
Document the pharmacist's hobbies
Document the pharmacist's family
Document the pharmacist's taste
Document the pharmacist's skills

Life_Of_A_Pharmacist.dialogue: This place could use a makeover, but I don't want it looking like your raggedy Raider Dens. See if you can find out how my fellow medical greats used to live.

Fragmented_Logs.title: Fragmented Logs

objectives.text: In either of the Robotic Sandbox control rooms, repair the out-of-service terminal with 1 Electrical Component
Enable the power in any of the conduit backrooms near the Robotic Sandboxes
Boot the main frame data terminal in the Cultural Archives service backrooms

Fragmented_Logs.dialogue: Do you remember the information you dug up about Project Heartwood? I've been looking over it, and it all seems to lead back to Stella Montis. [ 1 ]

Safe_Passage.title: Safe Passage

objectives.text: Destroy 2 ARC enemies using any explosive grenade

Safe_Passage.dialogue: I heard rumors about some signal Shani picked up. ARC is constantly adapting, and I'm sure this won't be their last warning sign. Well, if it's an arms race they want, they can get one.

In_My_Image.title: In My Image

objectives.text: Deploy into Stella Montis
Find and search 3 Androids

In_My_Image.dialogue: I just treated one of the first Raiders who visited Stella Montis, and she said that she saw... others. Androids, very much like me.

Tribute_To_Toledo.title: Tribute To Toledo

objectives.text: Get a Power Rod for Celeste

Tribute_To_Toledo.dialogue: So [ 1 ] , the Official Toledo Tubes Management is demanding one of our Power Rods for usage of "their" Slingshot tubes. Hey [ 2 ] , don't let the name fool you, they're in no way official; just thugs with lots of power. Could you help me with this?

Furtive_Meetings.title: Furtive Meetings

objectives.text: Search for the secret meetings spot under a staircase in the Medical Research Area
Find the secret meeting spot near the ventilation shaft between Robotic Sandbox B and Seed Vault
Find the secret meeting spot at the bottom of the staircase connecting Cultural Archives and Seed Vault
Search the meeting area
Bring the Secret Meeting Info to Shani

Furtive_Meetings.dialogue: I'm still sorting through the data you found in Stella Montis, but something's caught my eye. So, [ 1 ] I'd like you to look into it.

With_A_Trace.title: With A Trace

objectives.text: Reach the Barren Clearing
Find signs of who brought down the ARC machines
Inspect the Adorned Wreckage
Inspect the communications device

With_A_Trace.dialogue: That downed machine... We weren't the ones who did that. We know that there are still stray survivors out there, but this? This goes far beyond a single person.

What_Goes_Around.title: What Goes Around

objectives.text: Destroy any ARC using a Fireball Burner

What_Goes_Around.dialogue: We can't build ARC tech from scratch, but there's plenty I can tinker with [ 1 ] from the pieces you salvage. I'm currently trying to repurpose different ARC parts. Would you mind running an experiment for me?

Cold_Storage.title: Cold Storage

objectives.text: Search any J Kozma Ventures container
Deliver the Old World Books to Shani

Cold_Storage.dialogue: Reports about Stella Montis keep coming in, and it's unlike anything we've seen before. There may be records or relics from the past in there, and if so, I want them.

Digging_Up_Dirt.title: Digging Up Dirt

objectives.text: Locate the Santa Maria Houses in Old Town
Locate the Dead Drop inside the courtyard

Digging_Up_Dirt.dialogue: We caught a break. One of our scouts saw a member of the Tubes Management make a dead drop inside the Santa Maria Houses in Buried City. Now [ 1 ] this might be our chance to dig up some dirt on them for a change. You in?

Last_Entry.title: Last Entry

objectives.text: Find and access the right work station in the Seed Vault for clues
Search for the hidden key in the adjacent room
Search the Seed Vault and unlock the seed deposit box
Search the seed deposit box
Bring the Official Shutdown Documentation to Shani

Last_Entry.dialogue: More mentions of Mantikor, and more clear signs of dissent among the researchers. I suspect tensions eventually escalated.

A_First_Foothold.title: A First Foothold

objectives.text: Stabilize the observation deck near the Ridgeline
Enable the comms terminal near the Olive Grove
Rotate the satellite dishes on the church roof, north of the Data Vault
Nail down the roof plates on the Raider structure near Trapper's Glade

A_First_Foothold.dialogue: We’ve only just finished expanding the Tube network towards the Blue Gate, and we’re still laboring away at the rest. My crew’s been building new infrastructure around the valley to safeguard our Raiders, but the constant ARC threat has made it difficult to get anything done.

Battening_Down.title: Battening Down

objectives.text: Photograph the cracks forming in the seawall
Sample the shoreline near the hotel beach
Fix the leaking oil pipe in the northeast

Battening_Down.dialogue: We'd hoped the seawalls at Riven Tides might offer us some protection from the elements, but it seems the hurricanes were not kind to this place, either.

Shoring_Up_Defenses.title: Shoring Up Defenses

objectives.text: Destroy 5 Wasps
Destroy 3 Fireflies
Use 1 ARC Alloy to reinforce the Raider structure on top of any Stacking Yard crane
Board up shuttered windows in the hotel

Shoring_Up_Defenses.dialogue: The wide-open coastline used to mean danger, but now it's the only place we can spot new threats moving into the Rust Belt. So we'll have to make our own cover, and reinforce what few defenses we can find.

Reduced_to_Rubble.title: Reduced to Rubble

objectives.text: Take a photo of the Collapsed Highway
Go to the Broken Earth
Follow the trail of destruction through the Broken Earth
Investigate the unknown ARC machines

Reduced_to_Rubble.dialogue: That collapsed highway worries me; it looks to be recent. Much of Topside may be in ruins, but most of it is from ages ago.

Mixed_Signals.title: Mixed Signals

objectives.text: Destroy an ARC Surveyor
Obtain 1 Surveyor Vault

Mixed_Signals.dialogue: Have you spotted any Surveyors; the big round ones? They seem to be transmitting data back into orbit, and I can't help but think it's tied to that signal we picked up. Will you break one open, so we can try to decipher the data?

Clamoring_for_Attention.title: Clamoring for Attention

objectives.text: Use 3 Wires to repair and sound the emergency siren by the Warehouse Complex
Use a Battery to start the boom box in the Village
Sound any bus horn by the Checkpoint

Clamoring_for_Attention.dialogue: I think I've found something we might exploit. When bigger ARC machines are just far enough from each other, a well-timed distraction could pull one out of position. You want to test that idea?

Out_of_the_Shadows.title: Out of the Shadows

objectives.text: Destroy a Rocketeer
Obtain a Rocketeer Driver

Out_of_the_Shadows.dialogue: Did you see the flags? The time for cowering is over. You've been more than battle-tested, from what I hear; think you can take on a Rocketeer?

Combat_Recon.title: Combat Recon

objectives.text: Scope out a cover spot in the Parking Garage staircases
Scope out a cover spot in the buses near Marano Park
Scope out a cover spot in the attics around Main Street
Destroy 2 Spotters
Deliver a Spotter Relay to Shani

Combat_Recon.dialogue: With those Bombardiers roaming around, ARC has found an entirely new way to flush Raiders out of cover. If you're hoping to take one down, you'll need to sharpen your skills and your strategy.

Worth_Your_Salt.title: Worth Your Salt

objectives.text: Go to the Rocket Assembly
Search for the hidden Battery Prototype in a high place
Bring the Battery Prototype to the Industrial Recharger
Use the machinery to charge the battery
Deliver the Charged Battery to the drop-off point in the corner

Worth_Your_Salt.dialogue: I found notes that some electrical engineers at the Spaceport were working on advanced, salt-based batteries. If we can get our hands on one, perhaps it'll prevent full-scale power outages next time a ceiling comes crashing down.

Waking_the_Grid.title: Waking the Grid

objectives.text: Activate the security sensors in one of the Guard Towers
Start the Security Control Center in Departure Building
Search for any traces of a security breach in the Arrival Building Data Office

Waking_the_Grid.dialogue: There's a problem with our sensor coverage at the Spaceport. The security grid is old, so maybe it's just acting up. If you could get it running again, it'd save me a lot of sleepless nights.

A_Rising_Tide.title: A Rising Tide

objectives.text: On Buried City, find the foreman's barricaded apartment south of Piazza Roma
Access the foreman's digital logbook
On Dam Battlegrounds, reach the Power Generation Complex
Find a way into the Controlled Access Zone
Search the Controlled Access Zone for any clues about the foreman's reconstruction project

A_Rising_Tide.dialogue: Says here there was a foreman at The Dam, who got recruited after they canceled Project Heartwood , got put in charge of some big reconstruction project.

A_Toxic_Trail.title: A Toxic Trail

objectives.text: Return to the water intake below the Water Treatment Control building
Search the swamp for traces of the barrel's origins
Take a photo of the barrel truck
Search the trunk for clues about the saboteur's identity

A_Toxic_Trail.dialogue: We've got clean water again, but we can't risk people falling ill if the saboteurs return. We need to root them out once and for all.

Collision_Course.title: Collision Course

objectives.text: Destroy a Comet
Deliver a Comet Igniter to Tian Wen

Collision_Course.dialogue: Many Raiders have learned how to dodge a Comet, but far too few know how to bring them down and get at their inner parts.

Armored_Transports.title: Armored Transports

objectives.text: Reach the Checkpoint
Search the Guard huts for a Armored Patrol Key Card
Reach the Traffic Tunnel near the Blue Gate Checkpoint
Find and unlock the rear door of an armored patrol car

Armored_Transports.dialogue: Ever since we expanded the tunnels to the Blue Gate, some rare pieces have started appearing on the black market. Meanwhile, I'm stuck here peddling battered old Rattlers. If I don't find new supply lines, I'll be left in the dust.

The_Clean_Dream.title: The Clean Dream

objectives.text: On Spaceport, search 4 containers in the underground tunnels
Find and monitor any Filtration System in the tunnels
On The Blue Gate, visit the Maintenance Bunker
Monitor the Purification System in the bunker
Find and photograph the blueprints in the bunker

The_Clean_Dream.dialogue: You know what I've been dreaming of lately? A talking water distiller! Crazy, huh? But seriously, with purer compounds I could make explosives with more oumph! Would be something, right?

Sparks_Fly.title: Sparks Fly

objectives.text: Destroy a Hornet with a Trigger 'Nade or Snap Blast Grenade

Sparks_Fly.dialogue: Those Hornet stings can really mess you up, if you're unlucky. And even if you destroy one, you're still wasting ton of ammo. I've been working on a more elegant way to bring them down. Care to make some sparks fly?

Snap_And_Salvage.title: Snap And Salvage

objectives.text: Take a Photo of any of the Rovers in the Sandbox
Search the papers in the Security Checkpoint room by the Lobby
Deliver a Flow Controller to Tian Wen
Deliver a Magnetron to Tian Wen

Snap_And_Salvage.dialogue: All of Speranza is buzzing about Stella Montis right now, and I admit it's caught my attention. Let the others sort [ 1 ] the whats and hows; I'm interested in the tech inside.

Turnabout.title: Turnabout

objectives.text: Go to the North Trench Tower (Key is Required)
Locate and upload the blackmail files to Celeste

Turnabout.dialogue: I got a plan. If we recover the evidence against the Tubes Management [ 1 ] before they get to it, we might get them off our backs once and for all.

Building_A_Library.title: Building A Library

objectives.text: Locate the Library in the City Center
Find 1 romance book
Find 1 detective book
Find 1 adventure book
Deliver 3 books to Apollo

Building_A_Library.dialogue: Our library selection has grown pretty stale. Could you head out to Buried City, and find something more for us to read? Make sure you bring something for everyone.

Line_in_the_Sand.title: Line in the Sand

objectives.text: Find out why the train never reached Marano Station
Find out who orchestrated the robbery
Find out where the thruster valves were stashed
Search the basement of the merchant's nearby apartment

Line_in_the_Sand.dialogue: That Stella Montis hard drive container more than just the shutdown documentation - it also had the transport schedules of some pretty critical Exodus components.

Bombing_Run.title: Bombing Run

objectives.text: Destroy a Bombardier
Deliver a Bombardier Cell to Shani

Bombing_Run.dialogue: Now, time to see if that recon paid off. If we can teach Raiders to effectively counter Bombardiers up there, we'd be a lot safer down here.

On_Deaf_Ears.title: On Deaf Ears

objectives.text: Find the researcher's guest logs on the reception computers
Find where the researcher held their lecture, and access their notes
Find information about the prototypes on the Medical Research computers
Find the printed shipping logs in the Assembly Workshops

On_Deaf_Ears.dialogue: Seems like every other Raider here has some serious hearing damage. I heard rumors they developed some next-generation [ 1 ] hearing aids at Stella Montis. If you can track them down, we might be able to use our indoor voices, for once.

The_Stench_Of_Corruption.title: The Stench Of Corruption

objectives.text: Reach the southwest lobby of the Departure Building
Find the staff locker room
Search the room for any clues of the saboteur's identity
Reach the tunnels below the Spaceport
Use the key on any Flushing Terminal to override the bypass protocol

The_Stench_Of_Corruption.dialogue: That key you found in the barrel truck... I won't jump to accusations just yet, but this certainly reeks of an inside job. Could you investigate a hunch I have?

A_New_Type_Of_Plant.title: A New Type Of Plant

objectives.text: Search for the new plant near the Baron Husk in the Old Battleground
Deliver the Possibly Toxic Plant to Lance

A_New_Type_Of_Plant.dialogue: Some scouts have been bringing back reports of these weird plants spreading into the area. Now, this makes your old pal Lance think it may have some interesting uses.

A_Prime_Specimen.title: A Prime Specimen

objectives.text: Obtain 2 ARC Powercells
Interact with any ARC Deforester
Loot an ARC Deforester

A_Prime_Specimen.dialogue: That Deforester by the Blue Gate may have caused some real devastation, but a pristine husk like that is also an invaluable sample for our research.

Keeping_an_Eye_Out.title: Keeping an Eye Out

objectives.text: Locate the collapsed highway by the southern edge of the Barren Clearing
Find Bilguun's shelter, and search for any clues of his presence

Keeping_an_Eye_Out.dialogue: I'm looking for someone. Bilguun. You might've seen him around, but chances are you haven't. He's... not the most sociable person around, you see. He spends a lot of time Topside, but usually returns to Speranza regularly to check in.

Outstanding_Balance.title: Outstanding Balance

objectives.text: Search for Dodger's stash inside the Traffic Tunnel
Search Dodger's deal spot by the Pilgrim's Peak antenna
Deliver Dodger's Note to Tian Wen

Outstanding_Balance.dialogue: I had a deal for a Bastion Cell lined up with a Raider called Dodger, but he's gone quiet. I need someone to track down his stash before some scavenger stumbles into it. Interested?

The_League.title: The League

objectives.text: Deliver a Deflated Football to Apollo
Deliver a Bicycle Pump for Apollo
On Dam Battlegrounds, photograph the goal by the Water Towers
On Buried City, photograph the football magazines in any kiosk
Search for a Deflated Football
Search for a Bicycle Pump

The_League.dialogue: Kids around here have been kicking empty grenade casings around. It's only a matter of time before they're not so empty. So here's the plan: You help me with some prep work, and I'll set up an actual team for the young ones.

With_A_View.title: With A View

objectives.text: Obtain a Rotary Encoder
Visit any of the Control Rooms near the Assembly Line
Use the Rotary Encoder to activate the server switch
Interact with a nearby computer to help identify the correct paths
Deliver an Ion Sputter to Shani

With_A_View.dialogue: Have you ever noticed those streaks of light darting across the skies? I've seen too much to believe they're natural, but it'll take more than a hunch to convince Celeste.

Safe_Harbor.title: Safe Harbor

objectives.text: Find the clue left by the restaurant kitchen staff
Find the area portrayed in the sketch
Dig up the buried part
Deliver the Precision Gimbal to Tian Wen

Safe_Harbor.dialogue: Seems like news of the train derailment spread fast... And drove many workers to stash some very tasty technology away from prying eyes.

On_The_Map.title: On The Map

objectives.text: Head to where the Fuel Lines snapped, and transmit your location
Head to the antenna near the Fuel Control, and transmit your location
Head to the cactus patch in the wall breach, and transmit your location
Transmit your location from the roof of the Container Storage building
Find the container covered in tarp, and mark it

On_The_Map.dialogue: We know the coordinates for those hearing aids, but I'll have to cross-reference them with a paper map of the Spaceport. Those legs of yours aren't too tired, are they?

Settled_in_Full.title: Settled in Full

objectives.text: Destroy a Bastion
Deliver a Bastion Cell to Tian Wen

Settled_in_Full.dialogue: Lucky for you, Dodger's debt can still be settled. Bring me a Bastion Cell. A real one, pulled from a real Bastion. Consider what Dodger owed me transferred to credit for you. Okay?

Test_Case.title: Test Case

objectives.text: Deliver a Hornet Driver to Apollo
Deliver a Fireball Burner to Apollo
Destroy a Firefly
Deliver a Firefly Burner to Apollo

Test_Case.dialogue: Hey, question for you. What do you get if you cross a Hornet and Fireball? If your answer is 'a Firefly'. then we're on the same page.

Movie_Night.title: Movie Night

objectives.text: Deliver a Portable TV to Apollo
On Stella Montis, search the Cultural Archives for old movie tapes
Deliver the Stack Of Movie Tapes to Apollo

Movie_Night.dialogue: Everyone's been on edge ever since rumors of that ARC signal spread. I was thinking a movie night would be a great distraction, but I'm missing some crucial supplies. [ 1 ] Help me out, yeah?

Stable_Housing.title: Stable Housing

objectives.text: Go to the Security Bridge
Search for the safe in the side room by the third-floor staircases
Head upstairs to the fourth-floor control room
Use the Access Card Printer to print a key to the safe
Search for alternate ways into the safe
Retrieve the contents of the safe
Deliver the Project Heartwood Blueprints to Tian Wen

Stable_Housing.dialogue: You like a certain amount of uncertainty, right? A client wants the contents of a locked safe in Stella Montis. It's intact, so whatever's inside has been there since before the Exodus. Interested?

A_Wrench_in_the_Works.title: A Wrench in the Works

objectives.text: Search the buses near the western gate
Locate the stash of sabotage supplies hidden at the Water Towers

A_Wrench_in_the_Works.dialogue: Looks like the resentment ended up reaching the ground staff of the Spaceport itself. A mutiny brewing, right in the heart of the Exodus.
